title: AdvancementResetter
description: Reset player advancements easily with a single command.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

AdvancementResetter is a simple yet powerful plugin designed to allow players to reset their entire list of completed advancements with a single command. Once a player runs the /resetadvancements command, the plugin iterates through all available advancements on the server and revokes any completed criteria for the player, effectively resetting their progress. [More detailed description here.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/25)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
